title: Molecular Biology and Genetics (Turkish) Program Educational Objectives
content:
Molecular Biology and Genetics (Turkish) Program Educational Objectives

Program Educational Objectives

1. The aim of the Molecular Biology and Genetics Department is to train undergraduates with full of knowledge and capability to apply the basic terms of the profession and able to continue to higher degree programmes.

2. In order to achieve this aim, theoretical, practical and laboratory courses as well as studies to develop skills and attitudes which are important items of education are made during the training.
